furosemide.name: Furosemide
furosemide.purpose: Diuretic (Water pill). Reduces extra fluid in the body to treat fluid retention and swelling.

spironolactone.name: Spironolactone
spironolactone.purpose: Potassium-sparing diuretic. Helps treat fluid retention and heart failure.
spironolactone.dose: 12.5 mg · ½ of a 25 mg tablet
spironolactone.instructions: Take HALF (½) of a 25 mg tablet with food.

sacubitril_valsartan.name: Sacubitril / Valsartan
sacubitril_valsartan.purpose: Angiotensin receptor-neprilysin inhibitor. Treats heart failure and relaxes blood vessels.
sacubitril_valsartan.instructions: Can be taken with or without food.

pravastatin.name: Pravastatin
pravastatin.purpose: Statin. Lowers bad cholesterol and triglycerides in the blood.
pravastatin.instructions: Can be taken with or without food.

methocarbamol.name: Methocarbamol
methocarbamol.purpose: Muscle relaxant. Treats muscle spasms and pain.

dapagliflozin.name: Dapagliflozin
dapagliflozin.purpose: SGLT2 inhibitor. Helps kidneys remove glucose from blood and treats heart failure.
dapagliflozin.instructions: Can be taken with or without food.

metformin.name: Metformin
metformin.instructions: MUST take with a meal to prevent stomach upset.

glimepiride.name: Glimepiride
glimepiride.purpose: Sulfonylurea. Stimulates pancreas to release insulin to control blood sugar.
glimepiride.instructions: MUST take with breakfast or your first main meal.

clopidogrel.name: Clopidogrel
clopidogrel.instructions: Can be taken with or without food.

aspirin.name: Aspirin
aspirin.purpose: Antiplatelet. Prevents blood clots and reduces inflammation.
aspirin.instructions: Take with food or a full glass of water. Do NOT crush or chew.

metoprolol.name: Metoprolol Succinate ER
metoprolol.purpose: Beta-blocker. Treats high blood pressure and heart conditions.
metoprolol.instructions: Take with or right after a meal. Do NOT crush, chew, or divide.

atorvastatin.name: Atorvastatin
atorvastatin.instructions: Taken at night because cholesterol production is highest during sleep.

zolpidem.name: Zolpidem Tartrate
zolpidem.purpose: Sedative. Treats insomnia and helps you fall asleep.
zolpidem.instructions: Take on an EMPTY stomach right before getting into bed.

tramadol.name: Tramadol
tramadol.purpose: Analgesic. Treats moderate to severe pain.
tramadol.instructions: Every 6 hours as needed. Take with food if it causes nausea.

peg3350.name: Polyethylene Glycol 3350
peg3350.instructions: At bedtime as needed. Dissolve fully in liquid.

acetaminophen.name: Acetaminophen
acetaminophen.purpose: Analgesic. Treats mild to moderate pain and fever.
